title: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
summary: A prompt engineering skill that injects aesthetic judgment into AI outputs, preventing the generation of boring, generic, or low-quality content. Implemented as a Shell-based skill compatible with multiple agent frameworks. 42.4k stars with 8,651 stars gained this week.
chinese_summary: 一款为 AI 输出注入审美判断的提示工程 Skill，防止 AI 生成无聊、通用或低质量的内容。以 Shell 脚本形式实现，兼容多种 Agent 框架。4.24 万星，本周新增 8651 星。
